CustomField.formula: IF( HR_HH_Override__c = 0, "No HH Size", IF( HOMEtracker__Annual_Income_Eligibility__c = 0, "No Income", IF( HOMEtracker__Annual_Income_Eligibility__c <= Low_Income_Limit__c , "Low Eligible", IF( HOMEtracker__Annual_Income_Eligibility__c <= Moderate_Income_Limit__c, "Mod Eligible","Ineligible"))))
CustomField.label: HR Eligibility Calculated
